name: AI Dev Template (Python 3.14 + Claude Code)
onCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash; grep -qF "$HOME/.local/bin" ~/.bashrc || echo "export PATH=\"\$HOME/.local/bin:\$PATH\"" >> ~/.bashrc'
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv sync; fi; grep -qF "source ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate" ~/.bashrc || echo "[ -f ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate ] && source ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate" >> ~/.bashrc; claude --version || true'
